context: Tests whether the CryptoTokenKit skill covers current iOS 26 NFC smart-card sessions, registration, token-backed keychain lookup, and lifecycle details.

checklist.name: iOS 26 NFC availability
checklist.description: States that createNFCSlot(message:completion:) and isNFCSupported() are iOS/iPadOS 26+ APIs.

checklist.name: Slot manager guards
checklist.description: Guards TKSmartCardSlotManager.default and isNFCSupported() before creating an NFC smart-card slot.

checklist.name: NFC slot to smart card
checklist.description: Uses the TKSmartCardSlotNFCSession slotName to obtain a TKSmartCardSlot and TKSmartCard for APDU communication.

checklist.name: Session cleanup
checklist.description: Ends the NFC session with TKSmartCardSlotNFCSession.end().

checklist.name: Registration manager
checklist.description: Uses TKSmartCardTokenRegistrationManager for iOS 26+ smart-card registration instead of inventing custom persistence.

checklist.name: Token-backed keychain behavior
checklist.description: Uses kSecAttrTokenID, TKTokenWatcher, and errSecItemNotFound handling for token-backed keychain references.
